title: Vitrazza - Welcome Series Generates $564K in Revenue
description: Welcome email series with 50%+ open rates, combined with segmented promotional campaigns achieving 30%+ open rates. Strategy focused on immediate value delivery and brand storytelling in the welcome flow.
conversion_data: Welcome series generated $564,200 revenue in <4 months. Email sales up 55%. CTR up 20%. Welcome flow open rates 50%+, campaign open rates 30%+.

title: Valentte - 360% Email Revenue Increase via Klaviyo Automation
description: Recreated the personal, face-to-face market-stand experience through email. Behavioral segmentation and VIP tiered programs. Flows include welcome, abandoned cart, win-back, review requests, and VIP loyalty. Personal conversational tone throughout.
conversion_data: 360% increase in email revenue over one year. 54% of total revenue attributed to email. 100,000 new subscribers acquired. Order rate 2x sector average for targeted segments.

title: Laird Superfood - 102% YoY Email Revenue Increase
description: Leveraged predictive repeat purchase timelines to trigger buy-again flows. Early access campaigns for VIP subscribers during BFCM. Strategy centered on personalization and CDP feature optimization rather than design overhaul.
conversion_data: 102% YoY increase in email revenue. 60% of ecommerce revenue from email (2022). 87% YoY jump in campaign open rates (Nov). 25% YoY increase in automated flow open rates.

title: Klaviyo Automation Generates $526K in Under a Year
description: Removed discount incentives from abandoned cart sequences, relying on strong copywriting and behavioral segmentation instead. Created customer avatars and segmented by purchase value and history. 10 automated flows including abandoned cart, browse abandonment, welcome, upsell, win-back, and VIP.
conversion_data: Automated email revenue: $390,411 in one year. Abandoned cart recovery improved from 1% to 5.2% (500% improvement). Cart flow revenue: $276,095. Browse abandonment: $62,461. Win-back: $30,000. Overall sales increase: 15%.

title: Callie's Hot Little Biscuit - 157.8% YoY Growth in Flow Revenue
description: Loyalty-based incentive structure using purchase milestones. Second purchase triggers VIB (Very Important Biscuiteer) status. Third purchase triggers free shipping. 20+ total automations encouraging repeat purchases.
conversion_data: 157.8% YoY growth in flows revenue. Average customer purchases 2x annually. 20+ automations driving incremental revenue.

title: Every Man Jack - 25% YoY Flow Revenue via Predictive Repurchase
description: AI-powered repurchase flow triggered by predicted next order date with pre-filled cart. Discovered optimal repurchase timing was 75 days (not the assumed 45 days). Machine learning identifies individual customer purchase cycles.
conversion_data: 25% YoY increase in flows revenue. $100M+ annual revenue brand. Optimal timing shifted from 45 to 75 days based on data.

title: Tatti Lashes - 35% Owned Marketing Revenue from SMS
description: Strategic discounting only on special occasions. Mobile-first messaging with SMS welcome flow, abandoned cart, back-in-stock, win-back, and birthday flows. Acquired 40K SMS subscribers in 3 months.
conversion_data: 35% of owned marketing revenue from SMS. Welcome SMS: 30% click rate, 9% conversion rate. 40K SMS subscribers in 3 months.

title: Wistia - 350% Lift in Paid Conversions from Onboarding Email Rewrite
description: Copy-led optimization of 8-email onboarding sequence. Emails 3x longer than controls, treating each as a sales letter. Used funnel-aware messaging (product-aware vs most-aware). Raw, unpolished voice using customer language. Story-driven content with prospect as hero. Specific metrics over vague claims.
conversion_data: 350% lift in paid conversions (3.5x increase). 8-email sequence, 1 per day. A/B tested via HubSpot with no offer changes.

title: Campaign Monitor - 127% CTR Increase from 30-Minute Email Redesign
description: Redesigned blog subscriber email in 30 minutes. Key changes: shifted prominence from logo to blog title, modernized typography, added high-contrast CTA button replacing small text link, improved visual hierarchy. Subsequent tests often achieve 50% CTR.
conversion_data: 127% increase in click-throughs. Often sees 50% CTR on blog subscriber email after ongoing optimization.

title: FEED.The Agency - $100K Revenue in 30 Days from Email Sequence
description: Short emails with clear CTAs, follow-ups every three days. Segmented flows for cold vs warm prospects. Used HubSpot free templates. Previously relied on referrals for 90% of clients. Strategy proved sophisticated results don't require expensive tools.
conversion_data: $100,000 generated in 30 days. 215% revenue increase. Moved from 90% referral-dependent to automated pipeline.

title: 8-Figure Brand - $27K/mo to $250K/mo in 90 Days
description: Complete email marketing strategy pivot for an 8-figure ecommerce brand. Restructured email program to drive both retention and revenue. Achieved transformational growth in a single quarter.
conversion_data: Email revenue grew from $27K/month to $200K+/month in Q2. 826% increase in 90 days.

title: Mapplinks Client - $700K+ Revenue from Klaviyo in One Year
description: Comprehensive Klaviyo implementation with 10 automated workflows. Visually appealing designs optimized for mobile and desktop. Personalized segmentation by behavior, demographics, and interests. 59% of revenue from automated flows, 41% from campaigns.
conversion_data: $700,361 total revenue in one year. Flows: $413,838 (59%). Campaigns: $286,523 (41%). 10 automated workflows.

title: Mapplinks - $34K Revenue in 30 Days with Klaviyo
description: Account audit followed by content calendar targeting 2-3 campaigns per week. Created hyper-engaged segment for targeted campaigns. A/B testing on subject lines. Mobile-first design with compelling visuals and copywriting.
conversion_data: $34,000+ revenue in 30 days. Flows: $21,000+. Campaigns: $12,000+. Email share of revenue grew from 12% to 23%.

title: Med&Beauty - $43K from 10 Newsletters, 873% ROI
description: Short, visually engaging, product-specific campaigns. Welcome flow with 1,700+ completions. Abandoned cart recovery with 1,400+ recovered carts. Strategy combined promotional newsletters with automated flows.
conversion_data: $43K revenue from 10 newsletters. 873% ROI. 1,700+ completed welcome flows. 1,400+ recovered carts.

title: DAAG - $139K from Newsletters in 11 Months
description: Storytelling-focused newsletters with behind-the-scenes content and styling tips. Weekly newsletters combined with welcome flow and abandoned cart recovery. Single email generated $19.2K in 2 days.
conversion_data: $139K from newsletters in 11 months. $29.5K from welcome flow. $25.2K from abandoned cart recovery. $19.2K from single email in 2 days.

title: LandCafe.pl - 54% Sales Rate from Educational Welcome Series
description: Learn > Like > Trust > Buy principle with multi-email education sequence. Educates subscribers about artisanal coffee before selling. Builds relationship through expertise before conversion ask.
conversion_data: 41.30% sales rate during welcome series. 54% total sales rate across all email touchpoints.

title: Eveline Cosmetics - 7x ROI in One Month
description: Personalized campaigns with birthday discounts and countdown timers. Segmented newsletters, welcome automation, abandoned cart, post-purchase reviews. AI product recommendations added $7K to carts.
conversion_data: $13K from one campaign. $2,500 from promo-code email. $7K added to carts via AI recommendations. 7x ROI in one month.

title: TechSoup Polska - 1200% Increase in Campaign Order Value
description: Information-focused content addressing target organization needs. Educational newsletters with training invitations. Targeted specifically at nonprofit organizations needing technology access.
conversion_data: 1200% increase in orders value from email campaigns over one year.

title: ECS Publishing - 50% Open Rate via Purchase-Based Segmentation
description: Segmented campaigns based on customer purchase history. Targeted music publishing audience with relevant content. Achieved 10% list growth through subscriber acquisition.
conversion_data: 50% open rate. 3% CTR. 2K+ new subscribers (10% list growth). Direct sales spikes from targeted campaigns.

title: Fashion Retailer - $50K+ from Dormant Customer Re-engagement
description: Three-part automated sequence targeting 15,000+ dormant subscribers (no purchase in 90 days). Email 1: personalized product showcase by category. Email 2 (day 3): time-sensitive 15% discount. Email 3 (day 5): last-chance with best-sellers. Dynamic content blocks with first name and purchase history.
conversion_data: Open rate improved from 12% to 28%. CTR: 4.5% avg, 6.2% for incentive email. 14% of dormant customers purchased. $50,000+ revenue. 18x ROI.

title: SuperOffice - 1000% CTR Increase from Segmentation
description: Sent identical content to segmented vs unsegmented lists. Segmented list grouped by subscriber interests. Also tested image-heavy vs text-only emails: text-only with morning send time and mobile optimization won.
conversion_data: Unsegmented CTR: 3.45%. Segmented CTR: 38.8% (1,000% increase). Text-only emails achieved 53% higher CTR than image-heavy versions.

title: Whirlpool - 42% CTR Increase from Single CTA
description: A/B tested single CTA vs four CTAs in email. Single focused call-to-action dramatically outperformed multiple competing CTAs. Demonstrates the power of focused design and reducing decision fatigue.
conversion_data: Single CTA increased CTR by 42% compared to four CTAs.

title: DoughP - 9x Email Marketing Revenue Increase
description: Full-service email program built from scratch including campaigns, automated flows, and lifecycle marketing. Strategy included A/B testing, deliverability optimization, and inbox performance tracking.
conversion_data: 9x email marketing revenue increase. Part of CodeCrew's portfolio averaging 1,300% ROI across clients.

title: Maniology - 196% Revenue Increase from Browse Abandonment Revamp
description: Revamped browse abandonment series with improved design and targeting. Applied same optimization approach to Black Friday campaigns, doubling holiday sales.
conversion_data: 196% increase in browse abandonment revenue in 6 months. Black Friday sales increased over 100%.

title: Shinola - 27% YoY Revenue Increase via BFCM Segmentation
description: Strategic segmentation with optimized email and SMS flows targeting most engaged customers. Personalized messaging by customer segment. Luxury brand approach prioritizing engagement quality over volume.
conversion_data: 27% YoY increase in Klaviyo-attributed revenue. 48% rise in revenue per email recipient. 40% boost in revenue from automated flows.

title: Beekman 1802 - 49% YoY BFCM Revenue Growth
description: Used historical BFCM data to identify top-performing products and messaging. Personalized marketing for various customer segments. Data-driven approach based on prior campaign performance.
conversion_data: 49% YoY growth in total BFCM ecommerce revenue (2023).

title: Beyond Yoga - 274% Campaign Revenue Increase via Daily Product Launches
description: Combined generous discount with daily product launches throughout BFCM period. Created daily excitement and urgency with new product reveals each day rather than a single blast.
conversion_data: 274% increase in campaign revenue from October to November.

title: Rachel Riley - Extended BFCM Generated 48% of Total Holiday Revenue
description: Expanded Black Friday from single day to month-long campaign starting October 28. Extended timeline captured more purchase intent and reduced single-day pressure.
conversion_data: 48.1% of total BFCM store revenue from extended campaign. 77.33% YoY revenue increase.

title: To'ak Chocolate - 40% of Email Revenue from Automation
description: Automated welcome series shares brand storytelling with new subscribers. Enables small team to demonstrate customer care at scale. Premium chocolate brand leveraging narrative-driven automation.
conversion_data: Almost 40% of email revenue from automated campaigns. Small team operates entire email program via automation.

title: Prism Global - 21% Open Rate Increase, 28% Click Increase, 29% More SQLs
description: Simple templates focused on primary content. Shorter copy that performed better. Succinct copy with clear CTAs. Larger focus on email marketing automation.
conversion_data: 21% increase in email opens. 28% increase in email clicks. 29% increase in new sales-qualified leads. 48.6% average open rate. 30.5% average CTR.

title: Dormify - 92% Increase in Email Revenue via Automation
description: Ditched batch-and-blast system in favor of relevant, automated email series. Behavior-triggered emails replaced mass sends. Personalization based on browsing and purchase behavior.
conversion_data: 92% increase in email revenue after switching to automated, behavior-triggered emails.

title: Zachys - 53% Ecommerce Growth from Behavioral Email Triggers
description: Triggered email sends based on customer behavior as the cornerstone of optimization. Replaced calendar-based sends with behavior-based triggers for wine and liquor purchases.
conversion_data: 53% ecommerce growth attributed to behavioral triggered email optimization.

title: Benchmark - Back-in-Stock Emails: Highest Converting Automation
description: Back-in-stock emails are the highest converting automation type across all ecommerce. Urgency-driven design with product imagery and clear CTA.
conversion_data: Back-in-stock emails: 59.19% open rate, 5.34% conversion rate, highest conversion of any automated email type (6.46%).

title: Benchmark - Birthday Emails: 4x Higher Average Order Value
description: Birthday messages produce the highest average order value of any email type. Personal celebration creates strong emotional connection driving larger purchases.
conversion_data: 43.3% open rate. 14.3% click-to-conversion rate. Average order value $744.37 (4x higher than normal).

title: Benchmark - Automated Emails Convert 2,361% Higher Than Campaigns
description: Automated emails dramatically outperform scheduled campaigns across all metrics. One in three clickers purchase from automated messages vs one in 18 from campaigns. Automated emails generate 37% of email revenue from just 2% of sends.
conversion_data: Automated emails: 52% higher open rates, 332% higher click rates, 2,361% higher conversion rates vs campaigns. 37% of revenue from 2% of sends.

title: Benchmark - Cart Abandonment: 3-Email Series Recovers 37% More
description: Multi-email cart abandonment series dramatically outperforms single sends. Average 45% open rate and 21% CTR for abandonment emails. Top Klaviyo performers achieve 65.34% open rates and $28.89 revenue per recipient.
conversion_data: Average conversion: 10.7%. 3-email series recovers 37% more than single email. 3-email revenue: $24.9M vs $3.8M for 1-email. Top performers: 65.34% open rate, $28.89/recipient. Urgency subject lines outperform 69% of generic ones. Discounts increase recovery by 18%.

title: Benchmark - Welcome Emails: 320% More Revenue Per Email
description: Welcome emails consistently deliver 3-5x higher open and click rates than regular campaigns. The first email in any relationship sets expectations and drives disproportionate engagement.
conversion_data: Welcome email conversion rate: 0.94% vs 0.10% typical. 320% more revenue per email. 14.4% click rate vs 2.7% for other types. Ecommerce click-to-conversion: 56.8%.

title: Benchmark - Single CTA: 371% More Clicks, 1617% More Sales
description: Emails with a single call-to-action dramatically outperform those with multiple CTAs. Reducing cognitive load and decision fatigue leads to higher engagement and conversion.
conversion_data: Single CTA increases clicks by 371% and sales by 1617%. Button CTAs increase CTR by 28% vs text links (Campaign Monitor). Personalization: up to 139% CTR increase. Social sharing buttons: 158% CTR increase.

title: Benchmark - 2025 Email Marketing Performance by Industry
description: Based on MailerLite analysis of 3.6 million campaigns. Click rate is the most accurate engagement indicator due to Apple Mail Privacy Protection inflating open rates. Passion-driven industries typically achieve strongest engagement.
conversion_data: Overall: 43.46% open rate, 2.09% click rate, 6.81% CTOR, 0.22% unsub rate. Top open rates: Religion 55.71%, Hobbies 53.25%, Non-profit 52.38%. Top click rates: Legal 4.90%, Manufacturing 4.22%, Media 4.10%. Lowest open: Travel 30.10%, Ecommerce 32.67%.

title: Benchmark - Email ROI: $36-$45 Per Dollar Spent
description: Email marketing delivers the highest ROI of any marketing channel. Retail and ecommerce see the strongest returns. Automated and segmented campaigns dramatically outperform batch sends.
conversion_data: General email ROI: $36 per $1 spent (3,600%). Retail/ecommerce ROI: $45 per $1 spent (4,500%). Top performing industries: Games 15.1% conversion, Food & Drink 14.9%, Health 14.8%.

title: Traya - 15% Cart Recovery Rate with Interactive Emails
description: Used Mailmodo's interactive email features integrated with Shopify. Interactive elements allowed customers to complete actions within the email itself rather than clicking through to website.
conversion_data: 15% cart recovery rate on abandonment emails using interactive features.

title: New Balance Chicago - 10% List Growth with High-Performing Reminders
description: Grew email list by 10%+ in two months. Reminder emails encouraging leads to claim discounts outperformed regular promotions. Simple, action-oriented reminder design.
conversion_data: Email list grew 10%+ in 2 months. Reminder emails had 5-10% higher open rates than regular promotions.

title: River - 7-Email Welcome Sequence That Doubled Open Rates
description: Structured 7-email sequence over 14 days: (1) Resource delivery, (2) Origin story, (3) Educational framework, (4) Resource overview, (5) Objection handling, (6) Social proof, (7) Core offer. Each email earns the right to send the next. Conversational tone, short paragraphs, clear structure.
conversion_data: Doubled open rates. Tripled click-through rates. Welcome emails generate 4x higher open rates and 5x higher click rates vs promotional (Klaviyo data).
